---
title: "Perseverance and Ingenuity on Mars"
description: "Great milestone via Perseverance. Sending good vibes to Ingenuity!"
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-02-18"
categories: [space, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![NASA Perseverance + Ingenuity. Image from [IEEE Spectrum](https://spectrum.ieee.org/automaton/aerospace/robotic-exploration/nasa-designed-perseverance-helicopter-rover-fly-autonomously-mars).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Great milestone achieved today via Perseverance. Sending good vibes to its little friend Ingenuity!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_how-nasa-designed-a-helicopter-that-could-activity-6768398870306271232-dUlC).*
